name: JPMorgan Reserve Card

welcome_offer.description: Invitation-only card - no public welcome offer

earning_rates.notes: 10x points on travel purchased through Chase Travel
5x points on all other travel purchases

other_benefits.name: Priority Pass Select
other_benefits.description: Unlimited Priority Pass Select lounge access for cardmember and guests

other_benefits.name: Global Entry/TSA PreCheck
other_benefits.description: Up to $120 reimbursement every 4 years for Global Entry/TSA PreCheck

other_benefits.name: Transfer Partners
other_benefits.description: 1:1 transfer to Chase Ultimate Rewards airline/hotel partners

other_benefits.name: FHR Benefits
other_benefits.description: Access to Chase's Luxury Hotel & Resort Collection (FHR) with breakfast, upgrades, and $100 experience credit

other_benefits.name: The Hotel Collection
other_benefits.description: THC: Complimentary room upgrade and $100 food/beverage credit

other_benefits.name: Primary Auto Rental Collision Damage Waiver
Trip Cancellation/Interruption
other_benefits.description: Up to $20,000 per person and $40,000 per trip

other_benefits.name: JPMorgan Private Client
other_benefits.description: Exclusive to JPMorgan Private Client clients (typically $2M+ assets under management)

fhr_thc.notes: Full FHR and THC access, same as Sapphire Reserve but with higher AF and more exclusive access.

notes: Ultra-exclusive invitation-only card for JPMorgan Private Client customers (typically requires $2M+ at JPMorgan Chase). Replaced the JPM Palladium card. Similar benefits to Sapphire Reserve but more exclusive and higher AF ($995). Benefits exceed Sapphire Reserve slightly. Not publicly available — must be invited by JPMorgan.

recurring_credits.name: Travel Credit (Chase Travel)
recurring_credits.description: $300 annual travel credit for purchases through Chase Travel.

recurring_credits.name: The Edit Hotel Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $250 per half (2 × $250 = $500/year) on prepaid hotels via The Edit by Chase Travel.

recurring_credits.name: Exclusive Tables Dining Credit
recurring_credits.description: $25/month ($300/year) at Sapphire Reserve Exclusive Tables restaurants.

recurring_credits.name: StubHub / viagogo Credit
recurring_credits.description: $300/year on StubHub or viagogo event ticket purchases.

recurring_credits.name: DoorDash Credit
recurring_credits.description: $25/month ($300/year) on DoorDash purchases. (Excludes 1-yr DashPass — promotional, not recurring.)

recurring_credits.name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $100 statement credit for Global Entry or TSA PreCheck application fee, every 4 years.
